title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Cushman & Wakefield India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Cushman & Wakefield India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Cushman & Wakefield India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cushman & Wakefield India:
Cushman & Wakefield India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cushman & Wakefield India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
